detail.description: Sean Keys grounds out sharply, second baseman Brett Baty to first baseman Jared Young.
Sean Keys homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Alejandro Kirk scores. Ernie Clement scores.
Sean Keys pops out to third baseman Bo Bichette.
Sean Keys lines out sharply to center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Sean Keys flies out to center fielder Alejandro Osuna.
Sean Keys singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Sean Keys pops out to shortstop Corey Seager.
Sean Keys flies out to shortstop Colt Emerson.
Sean Keys lines out to left fielder Randy Arozarena.
Sean Keys grounds out, second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor.
Sean Keys grounds out, first baseman Josh Naylor to pitcher Nick Davila.
Sean Keys lines out to right fielder Luke Raley.
Sean Keys doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Victor Robles.
Sean Keys singles on a ground ball to center fielder Victor Robles.
Sean Keys pops out to shortstop Willy Adames.
Sean Keys singles on a ground ball to right fielder Heliot Ramos, deflected by first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Kazuma Okamoto scores. Brandon Valenzuela scores.
Sean Keys singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Heliot Ramos. Brandon Valenzuela to 2nd.
Sean Keys pops out to shortstop Willy Adames.
Sean Keys flies out to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Sean Keys grounds out, first baseman Ty France to pitcher Germán Márquez.
